no-restricted-syntax.message: Use a keys.ts factory (e.g. leaveKeys.list()) instead of an inline queryKey array. See asima-frontend/CLAUDE.md.

patterns.message: Cross-slice imports must go through the slice's public barrel ('@/features/<slice>'), never its internals. Same-slice imports must be relative ('./x'). See asima-frontend/CLAUDE.md and frontend-architecture.md §3.
